name: deploybot
description: Review, queue, and land pull requests through a shared GitHub merge queue

interface.shortDescription: Review and land pull requests safely.
interface.longDescription: Coordinates exact-head review, manual deploy authorization, burst merging, blockers, and overlapping pull requests.
defaultPrompt: Review this PR and prepare it for the merge queue.
Deploy this PR through the agent merge queue.
Show me what is blocking the merge queue.
